text: Black and white photograph of  a person tying a bow tie.
A close-up of several vases with different types of flowers in them.
The person is watching a screen on her laptop.
A city street filled with lots of buses and a motorcycle.
A building next to a church has a clock on it.
A glass of freshly poured beer from a bottle.

A pitcher is throwing a ball on a baseball field.
A big and small black bear are grazing in the grass.
Couple of benches outside with snow on them by the river
